name: Irish Mist Brownies
recipeIngredient: 2 squares (1 oz each) Unsweetened Baking Chocolate
1 square (1 oz) Unsweetened Baking Chocolate, melted
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a 2-quart saucepan, melt 1/2 cup butter and 2 squares of baking chocolate over medium heat, stirring constantly until smooth (4-6 minutes).
3. Stir in the remaining brownie ingredients (sugar, flour, eggs) until well combined. Spread into a greased 9-inch square baking pan.
4. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes or until the edges begin to pull away from the sides of the pan. Allow to cool completely.
5. In a small mixing bowl, combine all filling ingredients except the melted chocolate. Beat at medium speed until creamy.
6. Spread the mixture over the cooled brownie bars.
7. Drizzle with the melted baking chocolate. Allow to cool completely before cutting into bars.
8. Store in the refrigerator.
Nutrition info: 1 Brownie - 60 calories; 9g fat.
